title: Repository Baseline, Go 1.26 Toolchain, Modules, and Reproduction
description: The prototype runs from an unknown revision, uses an unrecorded Go toolchain, has no module identity, relies on warm caches, and cannot be rebuilt from a clean checkout. Learners cumulatively produce reproducible Go Pokedex repository baseline through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Inspect revision, branch, worktree, ignored files, configuration, tests, fixtures, secrets, licenses, and recovery anchor before editing.
Record Go 1.26.5, GOOS, GOARCH, GOTOOLCHAIN, module mode, build tags, and supported platform matrix.
Choose module path, command and internal package boundaries, dependency direction, and import visibility before growth.
